chunks.text: mouseBelt Labs is an ICO startup accelerator funding 10 companies in 2018 through our classOne program starting August 1. We also fund academic blockchain projects through our summerOne grant program starting June 15.
chunks.question: What is mouseBelt Labs and what programs do they offer?
chunks.answer: An ICO startup accelerator with two funding programs.

chunks.text: We want to support students, grad students and researchers who are excited about blockchain technology. We believe some of the most interesting ideas and innovations come from students and academia and we want to promote further growth in this space. Anyone interested in organizing blockchain-related events, working on proofs of concept or new research in this field is encouraged to apply.
chunks.question: Who is eligible to apply for mouseBelt's blockchain funding?
chunks.answer: Students, grad students, and blockchain researchers.

chunks.text: Organizational Support – This opportunity is for student organizations looking to enhance their operations by increasing membership, putting on events and activities, or acquiring signage, apparel, supplies, etc. Want to host events for the community? Sponsor a speaker at your university? Do you need funding for securing venues or providing refreshments? Talk to us about how mouseBelt can support your organization!
chunks.question: What does mouseBelt's Organizational Support program fund?
chunks.answer: Student organization events, supplies, and operational needs.

chunks.text: Hackathon Sponsorships – We want to sponsor traditional, blockchain-focused, or blockchain category prize hackathons at your institution. We can work with you every step of the way to ensure a smooth, fun, and successful event. Funding is available to acquire venues, provide food and swag, as well as award cash prizes. Provide us with dates for when you’d like to host a hackathon and we’ll get the ball rolling!
chunks.question: What types of hackathons does mouseBelt sponsor?
chunks.answer: Traditional, blockchain-focused, or blockchain prize hackathons.

chunks.text: Summer Resource Grants ($50k-$75k in value) – This opportunity is for students working in blockchain who want to take their projects to the next level. We will provide you with talented engineers who will work with you full-time to help you actualize your product. We can also provide marketing resources, help with launching token-sales and more. Apply now for access to our world-class team of developers and advisors!
chunks.question: What do Summer Resource Grants provide to students?
chunks.answer: Full-time engineers and marketing support for projects.

chunks.text: Summer Project Stipends – Students and teams who have received summer resource grants are also eligible to apply for additional funds for living expenses. These stipends will go to the teams with projects we believe have the most potential to make a huge impact in the world of blockchain. For more info on how to apply visit www.mousebelt.com/colleges
chunks.question: Who can apply for Summer Project Stipends?
chunks.answer: Teams already receiving Summer Resource Grants.
